title: DAG Mod
description: Race & class system, 200-level progression, custom dungeons, boss battles, two custom dimensions, NPC quests, party play, and craftable consumables with real combat effects. Everything in one mod.
body:
---
DAGMod: A Fantasy RPG Experience in Minecraft

v1.8.1 for Minecraft 26.2 (Fabric)

DAGMod transforms Minecraft into a comprehensive fantasy RPG. Choose a unique race and class, master powerful abilities, level up through a dynamic quest system, and conquer procedurally generated dungeons filled with custom bosses — all the way to level 200.

---
✨ Core Features

- 🎭 Choose Your Path: Combine one of 4 distinct races (Human, Dwarf, Elf, Orc) with one of 3 powerful classes (Warrior, Mage, Rogue). Each combination unlocks one of 9 unique synergies granting special passive abilities tailored to your playstyle.
- 📈 Level Up & Grow Stronger: Progress from level 1 to 200 with a classic XP system. Earn experience from combat, mining, quests, and gathering. Gain +1 heart every 10 levels, +1 attack every 5 levels, and +1 armor every 10 levels — up to +20 hearts, +40 attack, and +20 armor at max level.
- 📜 Embark on Epic Quests: Discover over 64 quests across four difficulty tiers (Novice → Apprentice → Expert → Master). Complete 4 race-specific epic quest chains of 10 quests each, unlocking higher tiers at levels 5, 15, and 25.
- ⚔️ Master Unique Abilities: Warriors have 5 devastating melee abilities, Mages wield 4 permanent spells plus wands and scrolls, and Rogues operate a dual ability system — 7 abilities split between an Energy Tome and cooldown items, plus a passive backstab.
- 🏰 Explore a Living World: Procedurally generated Bone Dungeons spawn in desert and badlands biomes with 10 unique structure pieces (hallways, crossways, stairways, treasure rooms, and more) — every dungeon is different. New structures include the Hall of Champions, village inns, taverns, and shops.
- 🌐 Custom Dimensions: Venture into the Bone Realm (undead dimension with boss hierarchy) and the Dragon Realm (volcanic dimension with the 300 HP Dragon Guardian flying boss). Six additional themed dimensions are also included.
- 🛒 Merchant System: Trade with 13 unique NPCs, each with distinct specialties and rotating premium inventories cycling every 72 hours. Merchants include the Armorer, Alchemist, Blacksmith, Jeweler, Mystery Merchant, Enchantsmith, and more.
- 👥 Party System: Team up with up to 5 players for shared XP (scaling bonuses from +5% to +20%) and cooperative party quests ranging from Easy to Legendary difficulty within a 50-block XP sharing radius.
- 🎒 Collect Epic Loot: Over 100 custom items including 11 armor sets (6 with progressive set bonuses), 15 special weapons, 9 synergy-bonused shields, 5 Mythril tools, 26 custom enchantments, class-specific consumables, fantasy foods, and magical scrolls.
- ⚰️ Death Recovery: A grave block spawns at your death location storing all non-soulbound items. Coordinates are shown in chat. Your grave persists across restarts, and void deaths safely snap your grave to the surface.

---
🚀 Getting Started

1. Installation: Install Minecraft 26.2, Fabric Loader 0.19.3+, and Fabric API 0.150.2+26.2. Drop the DAGMod JAR into your mods folder.
2. Find the Hall of Champions: A Hall Locator item spawns in your inventory — hold it to navigate to the Hall of Champions, your starting hub for race and class selection, merchants, and quests.
3. Choose Your Race & Class: Interact with the Race Selection Altar and then the Class Selection Altar inside the Hall. Your race is permanent; your class can be changed later with reset items.
4. Begin Questing: Find Quest Blocks in or around the Hall of Champions. Accept Novice-tier quests and work your way up through the tier system as you level.

---
